name: bim-guid-search
description: Console-unique diagnostic instrument. Accepts IFC GUID (22-char base64-compressed or UUID hyphenated), looks up element in vault via service-buildings GET /elements/{guid}. Returns IFC class, name, Uniclass ref, Pset summary, and properties link. Primary tool for operations staff receiving GUIDs from contractors, BCF issues, or system alerts.
html:
2N1NMOV9z7$8Ww2DVqvxPB IfcWall
WAL-EXT-001 — External wall (EF_25_10_30)
Ground Floor → Zone A → Grid B/2-3
Pset_WallCommon · Qto_WallBaseQuantities
View full properties →
Element not found: {{guid}}

variants.name: idle
variants.description: Empty state — input focused, no result panel.

variants.name: result
variants.description: Result panel visible with element details.

variants.name: not-found
variants.description: Error alert visible; input retains focus.

aria: Container: <search> landmark with aria-label. Input: aria-label='IFC GUID', aria-autocomplete='list', aria-controls pointing to result div. Result area: aria-live='polite' role='status'. Error: role='alert' (assertive live region). GUID display: <code aria-label='Element GUID'>.
service_dependency: service-buildings → GET /elements/{guid} (port 9102). Falls back to client-side search in loaded IFC model when vault endpoint unavailable.
